revisions.original_sentence: This paper presents a very novel integrated positioning framework for urban navigation.
revisions.revised_sentence: This paper presents an integrated navigation framework for urban navigation in challenging signal conditions.
revisions.reason: Remove hype phrasing and align the wording with mentor-preferred terminology.

revisions.original_sentence: It is worth noting that the method improves localization accuracy under difficult conditions.
revisions.revised_sentence: The method improves positioning accuracy under difficult conditions.
revisions.reason: Remove template phrasing and replace the looser term with the mentor-preferred technical term.
